paper.title: Can LLM-as-a-Judge Reliably Verify Rubrics in Agentic Scenarios?

official_github_release.ownership_evidence: The immutable arXiv v1 manuscript links this THU-KEG repository directly in the abstract and body.
official_github_release.release_timing_boundary: The repository's initial commit cdca7cd6f14e5240881663d5be79362b9b7f6727 was authored 2026-06-24, five days before arXiv v1. The pinned HEAD is a documented later immutable commit from 2026-07-11 containing two post-v1 result-packaging fixes. The paper does not pin a commit, so neither tree is asserted to be the exact experiment-time tree.
official_github_release.post_initial_commit_changes: The two later commits modify packaged strategy tables and generated figures only; the current pinned snapshot is used because its commit messages explicitly correct packaging errors.

contents_verified.python_compile_check: All tracked Python files under code/ compile successfully.
contents_verified.shell_syntax_check: All tracked shell scripts pass bash -n.

official_github_release.release_scope_note: The archive exposes normalized benchmark inputs, long reports and trajectories, final binary labels, taxonomy assignments, fixed strategy subsets, prompts, judge-generation and aggregation code, exported leaderboard/strategy summaries, and generated figures. It does not expose the full raw prediction matrices behind the main leaderboard or strategy sweeps, the annotation guideline used by workers, independent annotator label sets, adjudication records, worker qualifications, or pilot records. The 217 packaged coding trajectories exceed the 210 scored coding cases; the handoff review must establish the seven-row selection relationship rather than assume one-to-one coverage.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the immutable arXiv v1 PDF, extracted layout-preserving full text, and inspected the title/byline, source and construction sections, human-annotation description, metric and result tables, release-artifact appendix, strategy tables, error cases, ethics statement, and final page to verify coherent extraction through page 17. Pinned and archived the official linked repository's corrected current commit, verified ZIP integrity, parsed benchmark and fixed-subset files, counted labels and rows, checked release boundaries, and syntax-checked the released Python and shell code. This is source acquisition and release inventory, not a deep review, model rerun, validation of human labels as ground truth, or endorsement of general judge reliability, professional validity, capability, production fitness, or readiness.
review_handoff: Use the full local text and pinned release archive. Preserve the 298-packaged/284-scored DeepResearch boundary, the 217-trajectory/210-scored AgenticCoding boundary, class prevalence, post-v1 packaging-fix timing, and absence of raw prediction matrices, annotation guideline, annotator-level labels, adjudication records, qualifications, and pilot records. Recompute only what released artifacts support and do not infer uncertainty, independence, provenance, or reliability evidence from exported aggregate tables alone.
local_storage_note: The PDF and release ZIP are intentionally ignored local evidence; the extracted paper text, paper index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable URLs above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
